name: Rosemary Onion Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons fresh rosemary (or less if using dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and sauté for 7 minutes, or until it is lightly browned.
3. Stir in the sugar, red wine vinegar, fresh rosemary, salt, and pepper.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and continue cooking for an additional five minutes.
5. Serve the salsa warm or at room temperature.
